title: helianthus × divariserratus
intro: Helianthus × divariserratus, also known as a hybrid sunflower, is a cross between the Helianthus annuus and Helianthus debilis species, resulting in a unique plant with variable characteristics. While there isn't substantial information on its medicinal properties, Helianthus × divariserratus is reportedly used in traditional herbal remedies. However, its health benefits are largely anecdotal and require further research for verification. Herbal preparations of this plant, if used, are typically in the form of tea, although specific preparation methods and dosages are not well-documented.
